pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly target the 'broken-analytics' plugin directory.
setup_task.sh creates the plugin at this exact directory path.
task.json description and export_result.sh require a post with this exact title.
verifier.py checks that the remaining spam count is exactly 0.
verifier.py checks that the remaining revision count is exactly 0.

privileged_info_summary: The environment synthetically generates a WordPress fatal error using a plugin named 'broken-analytics' located at '/var/www/html/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/broken-analytics'. The task requires successfully deleting this plugin directory, removing all spam comments (expected remaining count 0), deleting all post revisions (expected remaining count 0), and publishing a new post titled exactly 'System Outage Resolved'.
